title: pneumatopteris glabra
intro: Pneumatopteris glabra, also known as the smooth lung fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pneumatopteris glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
